content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.capability_registry
FILE: cosmos/core/capability_registry.py (442 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS UNIFIED CAPABILITY REGISTRY
======================================

Central registry of ALL tools, APIs, integrations, and capabilities.
Models can query this to discover what they can do.

"Good news everyone! I finally know what I'm capable of!"

CLASSES:
- Capability: A single capability/tool/integration
  Methods: def to_any(self) -> dict
- CapabilityRegistry: Central registry for all system capabilities.

Features:
- Auto-discovery of int
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: def register(self, capability: Capability)
  Methods: def get_available(self, category: str=None) -> list[Capability]
  Methods: def get_by_category(self, category: str) -> list[Capability]
  Methods: def search(self, query: str) -> list[Capability]
  Methods: def record_use(self, name: str, success: bool=True)
  Methods: def get_summary(self) -> str
  Methods: async def store_in_memory(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_capability_registry() -> CapabilityRegistry
- async def initialize_capability_registry()
